courses.title: Foundations of Inclusive Leadership
courses.description: Learn the fundamentals of inclusive leadership through interactive lessons, including TED Talks, quizzes, and practical frameworks.
keyTakeaways: Understand the core principles of inclusive leadership

lessons.title: The Power of Vulnerability
lessons.description: Watch this inspiring TED Talk by Brené Brown

questions.question: What is the primary role of an inclusive leader?

options.text: To create an environment where all voices are heard

questions.question: Which quality is essential for effective leadership?

content_json.body:
# Leadership Principles

## 1. Lead with Empathy

Empathy is the foundation of inclusive leadership...

## 2. Foster Psychological Safety

Create an environment where team members feel safe...

## 3. Embrace Vulnerability

As Brené Brown teaches, vulnerability is not weakness...
